hooks.name: prompt-context
hooks.description: Inject current task context before each model call

hooks.name: pre-compact
hooks.description: Inject critical state before context compaction

hooks.name: careful-ops-check
hooks.description: Intercept destructive Bash commands (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, etc.)

hooks.name: pre-commit-check
hooks.description: Block git commit if no test/build/lint was run in this session

hooks.name: orient-session
hooks.description: Auto-inject project context (git log, STATUS.md, recent plans)

hooks.name: status-reminder
hooks.description: Remind to update docs/STATUS.md after editing source files

hooks.name: status-format-check
hooks.description: Validate STATUS.md has all required sections after editing

hooks.name: drift-detector
hooks.description: Periodic reminder to check plan alignment after every 30 tool calls

hooks.name: notify
hooks.description: System notification when Claude needs user attention

hooks.name: session-end
hooks.description: Validate state persistence before session ends
